summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of MarketDesk AI trading terminal. All 12 backend pytest tests passed (health, market data proxy via OKX, klines, global stats via CoinPaprika, real Claude Sonnet 4.5 analyze + chat, CORS, symbol mapping for BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT, error handling). Frontend e2e flow validated: Supabase sign-in, dashboard with live ticker data, AssetDetail page with full indicator panel + AI analysis, and graceful handling of missing Supabase tables on Watchlists/Alerts/Settings.

integration_issues.issue: 404 PGRST205 errors in console because watchlists/watchlist_items/alerts/user_settings/analysis_history tables don't exist on Supabase yet. UI degrades gracefully (no crash) — this is EXPECTED per agent_to_agent_context_note. Project owner must run /app/supabase/schema.sql in Supabase SQL Editor.

issues: Header shows 'CRYPTO · BINANCE' but data is actually sourced from OKX backend proxy. Cosmetic/labeling-only issue (not a functional bug).

action_items: (User-facing) Run /app/supabase/schema.sql in Supabase SQL Editor to create watchlists, watchlist_items, alerts, analysis_history, user_settings tables. Once run, re-test Watchlists/Alerts/History/Settings save flows.
(Optional cosmetic) Consider updating the 'BINANCE' label on AssetDetail header — data is proxied via OKX even though external symbol format remains BTCUSDT style.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Single 503-line file is acceptable now but if more endpoints are added consider splitting market proxy + AI engine into modules.
server.py L497: CORSMiddleware added AFTER app.include_router. Works in FastAPI but conventional pattern is to add middleware before include_router; consider reordering for clarity.
server.py L266: Global _http_client is created lazily but never closed on shutdown. Add an `@app.on_event('shutdown')` (or lifespan) to await `_http_client.aclose()` to avoid resource warnings.
server.py L390 /market/search: silently returns empty list on any error — would be friendlier to log and propagate non-network errors so the user knows search is degraded.
Dashboard.jsx L36: 'parseFloat(t.quoteVolume) > 5_000_000' threshold is hardcoded; if low-liquidity exchanges are added this could be a brittle filter — consider env or settings driven.
Auth.jsx: Password input has minLength=6 client-only; backend (Supabase) enforces, but consider adding visible help text.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of in-scope flows (auth, dashboard live data, AssetDetail indicators + AI analyze, Watchlists/Alerts/Settings graceful degradation)

seed_data_creation: None. No data written to Supabase. All AI test sessions used TEST_ prefixed session_ids.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend market data is proxied via OKX (Binance is blocked from server IP) and CoinPaprika for global stats. /api/analyze takes 5-15s (real Claude Sonnet 4.5). Supabase tables (watchlists, watchlist_items, alerts, analysis_history, user_settings) are NOT yet provisioned on the user's Supabase project — verifying graceful failure (no UI crash, console shows PGRST205 404s) is the correct behavior until the user runs /app/supabase/schema.sql. Once tables exist, retest: create watchlist + add symbol, create alert, AI analysis saves to history, settings save.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The PGRST205 404 errors visible in browser console are not bugs — they are expected because the Supabase schema has not been applied. The frontend correctly catches these errors and shows empty-state UI.
